Kadir Has University HasFest 2025

HasFest, organized by Kadir Has University Clubs Association, was held on 6 May 2025 at Kadıköy Festival Park.

With the club stands and playgrounds set up throughout the event, students had fun and had the opportunity to interact with different student clubs.

In addition to the bands Yörünge and Dolu Kadehi Ters Tut, Selin, one of the most popular names of the last period, gave music lovers unforgettable moments.

HasFest, which was organized with intense participation, offered students a pleasant and relaxing break before their final exams.
